The '''Procurator of Justice''' was the legal representative of prosecution in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], charged with overseeing the criminal justice system, and the prosecuting political prisoners and administering sentences on entire [[Planet/Legends|worlds]].<ref name="TCS" />

After the [[Declaration of a New Order]], the Procurator declared twenty-seven planets as expendable, including [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]], allowing their exploitation.<ref name="TCS" />

Due to the dangerous nature of the office, the Procurator of Justice was normally anonymous. It was only after the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] death at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] that the identity of the Procurator was made public.<ref name="TCS" />
